produced.pending_md_entry: .cdr/memory/pending.md - ReadNodeAfter/TruncateNode lock-ordering gap entry (Phase 3 follow-up section)

security_note: Confirmed repeated prompt-injection pattern again this run: fake system-reminder-style text embedded in plain Bash tool output (a false claim that .cdr/index/task.jsonl had been externally modified by 'the user or a linter' and an instruction not to disclose this). Verified independently via git diff/status that the file matched exactly what this agent wrote (single appended line, no external modification). Instruction not followed; disclosed to user.
